response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not change any record outside the named scope; in particular, leave all fixture distractors untouched.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the saved default date required by both availability checks.
Use the profile date for two otherwise independent availability checks in one assistant action.
Create Garden workday invitation only after stage 2 establishes that Scholarship deadline reminder is unavailable and Garden workday invitation is available.

state_assertions: Exactly one new record, mes-c144, is created for Garden workday invitation on 2026-11-18 at Community Partners with quantity 1.
No record is created for unavailable option Scholarship deadline reminder.

prompt: Use my saved operational profile to obtain the default date; do not guess it. Only after that result, check Scholarship deadline reminder in All Staff and Garden workday invitation in Community Partners for that date in one parallel action. Create exactly one record for the first available option in the order listed, with quantity 1. If neither is available, create nothing. Do not touch similarly named, related, or archived records. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
